stemHtml: Which one of the following statements below best describes the Centre of Gravity (CG) of an aircraft?

options.a: The CG is a theoretical point stated in the Limitations section of the Aircraft Flight Manual.
options.b: The CG is a fixed point through which the three axes of the aircraft act.
options.c: The CG is a theoretical point where all the mass is said to be concentrated.
options.d: The CG is a fixed point defined by the Operator and stated in the Operations Manual.
